personal.description:
I am a backend developer focused on building reliable, scalable, and efficient systems behind modern applications.
 
My work is centered on clean architecture, predictable behavior, and maintainable code. I care deeply about performance, data integrity, and how different parts of a system communicate with each other.
 
My goal is to design backend solutions that remain stable under load, evolve gracefully with business needs, and provide a solid foundation for great user experiences.
